title: Iron & Steel
description: This is mod all about metals!
body:
Iron & Steel has offically come to an end. Many versions never saw the light of day.

**METALLUM 0.5.0 IS NOW AVAILABLE ON PATREON FOR SUPPORTERS**

But the end is never the end it's just a new beginning.

Iron & Steel has officially been replaced by Metallum, a new mod that will be released to the public in a couple of months, but for now it is available on my [KO-FI](https://ko-fi.com/enderboy500) for supporters.

Metallum Beta 0.3.4 is now available on my patreon for supporters!

More Content Coming Soon
